Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.failure_mode: Condenser Improper water side flow rate
Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Supply Temperature can help monitor or detect the failure because an improper water side flow rate in the condenser can affect the chiller's ability to cool properly, leading to changes in the supply temperature.
Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.temporal_behavior: When the failure occurs, the Chiller 6 Supply Temperature sensor will likely show an increase in temperature over time, as the chiller's cooling capacity is reduced due to the improper water flow rate, resulting in warmer water being supplied to the system.

Chiller 6_Purge Unit Excessive purge_Chi.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Supply Temperature can help monitor or detect the failure Purge Unit Excessive purge because an excessive purge can lead to a change in the supply temperature of the chiller, which the sensor can detect.
Chiller 6_Purge Unit Excessive purge_Chi.temporal_behavior: When the failure Purge Unit Excessive purge occurs, the sensor Chiller 6 Supply Temperature may exhibit a sudden increase or fluctuation in temperature reading, indicating that the chiller is not operating efficiently due to the excessive purge.

Chiller 6_Refrigerant Operated Control V.failure_mode: Refrigerant Operated Control Valve Failed spring
Chiller 6_Refrigerant Operated Control V.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Supply Temperature can help monitor or detect the failure of the Refrigerant Operated Control Valve Failed spring in Chiller 6 because a malfunctioning control valve can affect the temperature of the supply water, which the sensor is measuring.
Chiller 6_Refrigerant Operated Control V.temporal_behavior: When the failure occurs, the Chiller 6 Supply Temperature sensor may exhibit abnormal temperature readings, such as a sudden increase or decrease in temperature, or unstable temperature fluctuations, indicating a problem with the chiller's operation.

Chiller 6_Compressor Overheating: Failed.failure_mode: Compressor Overheating: Failed due to Normal wear, overheating
Chiller 6_Compressor Overheating: Failed.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage is not related to monitoring or detecting compressor overheating, as tonnage refers to the cooling capacity of the chiller, not its temperature or operational state.

Chiller 6_Heat Exchangers: Fans: Degrade.failure_mode: Heat Exchangers: Fans: Degraded motor or worn bearing due to Normal use
Chiller 6_Heat Exchangers: Fans: Degrade.relevancy_reason: the sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage is not related to the failure mode of Heat Exchangers: Fans: Degraded motor or worn bearing due to Normal use, as it monitors the cooling capacity of the chiller, not the condition of the fans or their motors and bearings.

Chiller 6_Evaporator Water side fouling_.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage can help monitor or detect the failure Evaporator Water side fouling because a decrease in tonnage typically indicates a reduction in the chiller's cooling capacity, which can be caused by fouling on the evaporator water side.
Chiller 6_Evaporator Water side fouling_.temporal_behavior: When the failure Evaporator Water side fouling occurs, the sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage will likely show a gradual decrease in tonnage over time as the fouling reduces the heat transfer efficiency of the evaporator, leading to a decrease in the chiller's overall cooling capacity.

Chiller 6_Condenser Water side fouling_C.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage can help monitor or detect the failure because Condenser Water side fouling would likely cause a decrease in the chiller's cooling capacity, which would be reflected in a decrease in the tonnage reading.
Chiller 6_Condenser Water side fouling_C.temporal_behavior: When the failure occurs, the sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage would likely show a gradual decrease in tonnage over time as the fouling worsens, potentially with increased variability or fluctuations in the reading as the chiller struggles to maintain its cooling output.

Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.failure_mode: Condenser Improper water side flow rate
Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage can help monitor or detect the failure for Chiller 6 because an improper water side flow rate in the condenser can lead to a decrease in the chiller's cooling capacity, which can be reflected in the tonnage reading.
Chiller 6_Condenser Improper water side.temporal_behavior: When the failure occurs, the sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage will likely show a decrease in the tonnage value over time, indicating a reduction in the chiller's cooling capacity due to the improper water side flow rate.

Chiller 6_Purge Unit Excessive purge_Chi.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage is related to the cooling capacity of the chiller, whereas the failure Purge Unit Excessive purge is related to the purge unit's operation, which is a separate system, so it's unlikely that the tonnage sensor can detect this specific failure.

Chiller 6_Refrigerant Operated Control V.failure_mode: Refrigerant Operated Control Valve Failed spring
Chiller 6_Refrigerant Operated Control V.relevancy_reason: The sensor Chiller 6 Tonnage is not related to the failure of the Refrigerant Operated Control Valve, as it measures the cooling capacity of the chiller, not the valve's operation.
